'''notasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euchondrichthyan|euchondrichthyan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euchondrichthyan|euchondrichthyan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| notasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:notasithi|notasithi]] || [[word:notasiji|notasiji]] || [[word:notasishi|notasishi]] || [[word:notasiki|notasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:notasuthuthu|notasuthuthu]] || [[word:notasujuju|notasujuju]] || [[word:notasushushu|notasushushu]] || [[word:notasukuku|notasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:notasuthu|notasuthu]] || [[word:notasuju|notasuju]] || [[word:notasushu|notasushu]] || [[word:notasuku|notasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:notasufthuf|notasufthuf]] || [[word:notasufjuf|notasufjuf]] || [[word:notasufshuf|notasufshuf]] || [[word:notasufkuf|notasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:notasethe|notasethe]] || [[word:notaseje|notaseje]] || [[word:notaseshe|notaseshe]] || [[word:notaseke|notaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:notasothotho|notasothotho]] || [[word:notasojojo|notasojojo]] || [[word:notasoshosho|notasoshosho]] || [[word:notasokoko|notasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:notasotho|notasotho]] || [[word:notasojo|notasojo]] || [[word:notasosho|notasosho]] || [[word:notasoko|notasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:notasofthof|notasofthof]] || [[word:notasofjof|notasofjof]] || [[word:notasofshof|notasofshof]] || [[word:notasofkof|notasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:notasĂŻfthĂŻf|notasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfjĂŻf|notasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfshĂŻf|notasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfkĂŻf|notasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:notasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|notasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|notasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|notasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|notasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:notasĂŻfthĂŻf|notasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfjĂŻf|notasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfshĂŻf|notasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfkĂŻf|notasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:notasĂŻfthĂŻf|notasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfjĂŻf|notasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfshĂŻf|notasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notasĂŻfkĂŻf|notasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:notasĂŠthĂŠ|notasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:notasĂŠjĂŠ|notasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:notasĂŠshĂŠ|notasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:notasĂŠkĂŠ|notasĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:notasathatha|notasathatha]] || [[word:notasajaja|notasajaja]] || [[word:notasashasha|notasashasha]] || [[word:notasakaka|notasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:notasatha|notasatha]] || [[word:notasaja|notasaja]] || [[word:notasasha|notasasha]] || [[word:notasaka|notasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:notasafthaf|notasafthaf]] || [[word:notasafjaf|notasafjaf]] || [[word:notasafshaf|notasafshaf]] || [[word:notasafkaf|notasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:notasasha|notasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:notashĂ«sha|notashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notasrosha|notasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notasmusha|notasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:notasyasha|notasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotasnkshĂ«sha|gonotasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotasnkrosha|gonotasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotasnkmusha|gonotasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotasnkyasha|gonotasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:notatasasha|notatasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notatashĂ«sha|notatashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notatasrosha|notatasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notatasmusha|notatasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notatasyasha|notatasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotatasnkshĂ«sha|gonotatasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotatasnkrosha|gonotatasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotatasnkmusha|gonotatasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotatasnkyasha|gonotatasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:netĂŠsasha|netĂŠsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:netĂŠshĂ«sha|netĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:netĂŠsrosha|netĂŠsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:netĂŠsmusha|netĂŠsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:netĂŠsyasha|netĂŠsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonetĂŠsnkshĂ«sha|gonetĂŠsnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonetĂŠsnkrosha|gonetĂŠsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonetĂŠsnkmusha|gonetĂŠsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonetĂŠsnkyasha|gonetĂŠsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:notfasasha|notfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notfashĂ«sha|notfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notfasrosha|notfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notfasmusha|notfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notfasyasha|notfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotfasnkshĂ«sha|gonotfasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotfasnkrosha|gonotfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotfasnkmusha|gonotfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotfasnkyasha|gonotfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
